rationale.fidelity: Preserves the binary ex ante platform rule, latent seller quality, subsequent seller participation, buyer inference, transactions, and platform revenue objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, trigger, binary counterfactual, strategic mechanism, revenue stakes, and participation-information trade-off are all concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or claimed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Equilibrium behavior is labeled an assumption and realized revenue, welfare, and quality observability claims are bounded.
rationale.prose_clarity: Technically clear but repetitive and considerably overlong.
rationale.overall: Complete sequential-game fidelity with no hard failure.
